Who We Are

NOT JUST A GYM.
IT'S A LIFESTYLE.

Xtreme Fitness was built on a simple belief: world-class fitness should be accessible to everyone. Located in the heart of Sanjaynagar, Bengaluru, we've created a space where beginners and athletes alike feel at home.

Our facility features top-of-the-line cardio equipment, a full free-weight section, functional training rigs, monkey bars, battle ropes, and more — all maintained to the highest standards.

Most importantly, we believe fitness shouldn't cost a fortune. Our affordable membership plans are designed for every budget, with no hidden fees.

Meet The Owner & Head Trainer

THE FORCE BEHIND
XTREME FITNESS

AKSHATH
DEVADIGA

👑 Owner & Head Trainer
15+
Years of
Experience
500+
Members
Coached
2
Expert
Disciplines

Akshath Devadiga is not just the founder of Xtreme Fitness — he is the heart and soul of everything the gym stands for. With over 15 years of hands-on experience in fitness and strength training, Akshath has dedicated his life to transforming the health of Bengaluru's community.

A former competitive bodybuilder, Akshath brings championship-level discipline and knowledge to every coaching session. Having competed at the highest levels of the sport, he understands what it takes to push past plateaus, build genuine strength, and maintain peak physical condition — insights he now passes directly to his members.

Beyond strength training, Akshath is a certified nutritionist, which sets Xtreme Fitness apart from every other gym in Sanjaynagar. He doesn't just guide your workouts — he builds complete transformation plans covering training, recovery, and diet, ensuring your results are sustainable and science-backed.

Fitness is not a destination — it is a daily commitment. At Xtreme Fitness, I am here to make sure every single member has the guidance, the tools, and the motivation to become their strongest self.

— Akshath Devadiga, Founder & Head Trainer
